- [memory-api/crates/log-api/src/store_tests.rs](memory-api/crates/log-api/src/store_tests.rs) and [memory-api/crates/log-api/src/lib_tests.rs](memory-api/crates/log-api/src/lib_tests.rs): coverage for the new capture-side contract.
